scenario.name: KubeVoIP Registered Phone
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=phone [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] [last_Record-Route:] Contact: <sip:daniel@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=phone 1 1 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000
